subcodes.first_line: O divine herald! Thy letters were received, and astonishment was felt at the perturbation of thy thoughts concerning the upheaval at the Holy Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی مکاتیب شما رسید و از پریشانی فکر شما بجهت انقلاب بقعه مبارکه حیرت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
